name: misc_3009091-uhd_3840_2160_30fps
prompt: A tortoiseshell cat stands alert on a brick-paved patio, surrounded by a natural setting that includes large rocks and lush greenery. The cat, with its distinctive black and orange striped coat, stands with its ears perked up and its tail slightly raised, exuding a sense of curiosity and attentiveness. To the left, a terracotta pot holds a succulent plant, adding a touch of earthy color to the scene. The background features ferns and other plants, creating a serene and natural atmosphere. Throughout the video, the cat remains mostly stationary, occasionally shifting its gaze and head slightly but without any significant movement. The overall scene remains consistent, with the cat continuing to stand on the patio, maintaining its alert posture amidst the tranquil backdrop.
